item.title: Misa cosplay (Death Note)
item.description: Inspired by Sozomaika's iconic art of her! I tried to recreate it as well as possible, the hardest part was setting up the lighting in a way that shows up on the clothes but not too much that the background turns purple (: *other socials: https://instagram.com/anna_himejima https://reddit.com/u/aniku_
item.dc:creator: epicinternetgf

item.title: Jeez, sorry to disappoint ....
item.description: In 1960, Frankie Lymon performed “Little Bitty Pretty One” on national television, and many Southern viewers were shocked to discover he was Black—having previously only heard his voice on the radio and assumed he was white. The live audience’s visibly stunned reaction exposed the racial biases of the time. Despite his popularity, the moment highlighted the challenges Black artists faced in gaining equal recognition and acceptance in mainstream media. It became a powerful reflection of how race shaped perceptions in early American pop culture!
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: The Dump Before Time 14: My 14 Phone-Clearing Dump of Random
item.description:
I mean, let's at least hear them out.
Let's kick it off with a bang.
Vodka?
That's some sweet ink.
Take a hint.
Alone or in pairs.
Frosty!
Take it easy.
Sly Cooper.
Take a whiff.
I can smell it from here.
Ingenuity.
Smooth.
A little off target.
Ingenuity 2.
Looks good.
A mystery.
Fun for the whole family.
And you get to clean it all up!
PC Load Letter?
Don't mind if I do.
Dealing with Karens must be hard.
Have a spare.
Stealth.
Somehow I think I'd do the same.
Probably just a squirrel.
There is a difference.
He was just in the neighborhood.
Let's get an early start on this.
And Ozzy Osbourne got arrested for doing something similar. Where's his plaque?
Dress appropriately.
The void is sneaky.
Spread them cheeks.
They don't grow on trees.
It's been a long winter.
Goals.
That's no ceiling.
Going down.
Something about trade or whatever.
No, no, he's got a point.
Catch them all.
What are you doing, step teacher?
Wants to battle.
Flap gums too much you do.
Way to go, Cody.
I see no issue.
Relate.
Did you do it right?
Seriously.
Take a hint.
What would the customers think.
Maybe speed up?
We're on to you.
Again, a long winter.
I'm no botanist.
They're stuffed in there good.
Sometimes once is all it takes.
Back At Fork.
I demand this for my wake.
Party on.
It knows what it's doing.
New saint just dropped.
It explains a lot.
Not much progress has been made, honestly.
Ready for action.
Manscape.
Losers.
He don't need no education.
He's even got his coffee.
Started making trouble in my neighborhood.
It's art.
I did this years ago.
For defense.
Modern solutions.
It's cute.
Yeah, Pooh.
The right side looks good.
Taco cat is just taco cat backwards.
From Mexico, With Love.
Paradise.
That's so beautifully evil.
I've done this.
Take aim.
Yup.
Yeah, I'm kind of like this.
No comment.
Hard at work.
*golf clap*
Tastes like air.
Turn it off and on again.
They weren't even as long back then.
Amazing.
Everyone gets one.
I'm always grateful.
That's nice.
Weeks, even.
Maybe it's for soup or something.
A little late on this one.
Lzzy tax!
Void tax!
item.dc:creator: HisBubbliness

item.title: Update to previous post
item.description: Update to previous post so read that one for context. So they were supposed to pay the first installment of what they owe me according to our agreement. They did not and stopped answering calls. I was already working with the police and I'm starting a civil court case against them. The lead detective informed me today that the wife from the couple, the one who signed the docs with me got arrested lol. Fuck around find out This week is gonna be hard cause still broke as hell (literally 50 eurocents in my account) on account of the non payment and waiting for my pay from work and service. But the process is started and I'll be pushing it as hard as possible. Wish me luck. I'll probably won't update for a while as there will be not much happening. Courts in my country are slow af edit: how the hell did a third post go viral lol :D. Wish I had better news for y'all but hey, at least those are interesting. I'll check back if something moves but don't expect it to be soon
item.dc:creator: TyrCarter

item.title: Regrettable substitution "Diquat"
item.description: The ingredient, diquat, is widely employed in the US as a weedkiller in vineyards and orchards, and is increasingly sprayed elsewhere as the use of controversial herbicide substances such as glyphosate and paraquat drops in the US. But the new piece of data suggests diquat is more toxic than glyphosate, and the substance is banned over its risks in the UK, EU, China and many other countries. Still, the EPA has resisted calls for a ban, and Roundup formulas with the ingredient hit the shelves last year. “From a human health perspective, this stuff is quite a bit nastier than glyphosate so we’re seeing a regrettable substitution, and the ineffective regulatory structure is allowing it,” said Nathan Donley, science director with the Center For Biological Diversity, which advocates for stricter pesticide regulations but was not involved in the new research. “Regrettable substitution” is a scientific term used to describe the replacement of a toxic substance in a consumer product with an ingredient that is also toxic. https://www.theguardian.com/environment/2025/jul/06/weedkiller-diquat-organ-damage-study
item.dc:creator: dbox

Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.title: T Causes TX Deaths w/ federal cuts - BLAMES BIDEN
item.description:
Can't hear?
Can hear well enough to blame Biden when DOGE, under the 47th regime, cut these services.
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: A Day in the Life...(Frank edition)
item.description:
Woke up this morning and felt like crud, so I worked from home. Frank was very understanding. The white fuzzy rope is now Frank's new nemesis.
He found the regular food and decided to try some grown up cat food.
I dropped a spoon and Frank was not amused. It took him about a minute to calm down. And you know, a minute in human time is like five minutes in cat time.
The giant cat tree was climbed. And then promptly abandoned.
This is where he spent most of the day, helping me code one handed. Hope you guys are having a good day.
item.dc:creator: FrankTheKitten

item.title: Coast Guard rescue swimmer Scott Ruskin shares how he helped save 165 people during the devastating Texas floods at Camp Mystic.
item.description: Imagine the flex this guy has on dating apps, wanna hear about the time I saved 200 kids. Also, the way he talks compared to politicians and certain Presidents shows the contrast between doing the job versus blaming others

item.title: The Big Beautiful Delay — Why You're Not Feeling the Effect — Yet
item.description: CONTENT CONTROLS “Content Controls will allow you to see fewer posts from certain topics or tags while you browse Imgur.” https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26509094934171-Content-Controls HOW DO I MUTE OR BLOCK AN IMGUR USER? https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26508943104667-How-do-I-mute-or-block-a-user# HOW TO TAG YOUR POSTS Tags will help some people find your posts and other people avoid your posts. https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26511767487771-How-to-Tag CHECK TO SEE IF A SITE IS SAFE “Google’s Safe Browsing technology examines billions of URLs per day looking for unsafe websites. Every day, we discover thousands of new unsafe sites, many of which are legitimate websites that have been compromised. When we detect unsafe sites, we show warnings on Google Search and in web browsers. You can search to see whether a website is currently dangerous to visit.” https://transparencyreport.google.com/safe-browsing/search NOTE: Google keeps track of everything you search, including when you search on this site. Despite that, I use this site. FROM Mirrormancer: Saving things from the memory hole is good, and here's some tools for you and others to use for that. While a good ol printscreen grab will suffice, I like to use Greenshot to take snapshots of everything for documentation purposes. Been getting a LOT of use out of it over the last few months. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Greenshot For documenting sites, I like to use ( archive.is ) to make backups + it's also good for bypassing paywalls. Example: https://archive.is/CHouq CONTACT ELECTED OFFICIALS https://www.usa.gov/elected-officials COMMITTEE for a RESPONSIBLE FEDERAL BUDGET https://www.crfb.org SNOPES (Fact Checker) https://www.snopes.com LIST OF FACT-CHECKING WEBSITES https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_fact-checking_websites NON-LEGACY MEDIA Brian Tyler Cohen https://www.youtube.com/@briantylercohen https://bsky.app/profile/briantylercohen.bsky.social Glenn Kerschner https://www.youtube.com/@GlennKirschner2 https://bsky.app/profile/glennkirschner.bsky.social Marc Elias https://www.youtube.com/c/DemocracyDocket https://bsky.app/profile/marcelias.bsky.social https://www.democracydocket.com Paul Krugman Substack https://paulkrugman.substack.com Timothy Synder Substack https://snyder.substack.com Robert Reich Substack https://robertreich.substack.com/p/where-the-hell-is-the-moderate-middle Garrison Keillor Substack https://garrisonkeillor.substack.com/p/a-few-last-words-about-the-maga-man Andrew Tobias https://andrewtobias.com Letters from an American: Heather Cox Richardson Substack https://heathercoxrichardson.substack.com Civil Discourse with Joyce Vance https://joycevance.substack.com Gov Brief Today https://govbrief.today PROGRESS ACTION FUND https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJy-6_Zq04smZ3iUbQntrPg LEGAL EAGLE https://www.youtube.com/@LegalEagle ABOVE THE LAW https://abovethelaw.com/category/biglaw/ “Staying Safe While Protesting & Organizing” (PDF) https://static1.squarespace.com/static/6547d46ce0be13435001c0ad/t/68027264c50ab52ca94d5a89/1744990820280/Staying+Safe+While+Protesting.pdf 50 PROTESTS. 50 STATES. 1 MOVEMENT https://www.fiftyfifty.one INDIVISIBLE https://indivisible.org MOBILIZE https://www.mobilize.us RESISTBOT is a chatbot that turns your texts into faxes, postal mail, or emails to your representatives in minutes. https://resist.bot KICK OUT THE CLOWNS: Women’s March https://action.womensmarch.com/calendars/kick-out-the-clowns?akid=22525.3568445.fS0dJz&filter%5Blocation%5D=10023&page=1&rd=1&t=2 MoveOn https://front.moveon.org In a MAGA society filled with acts of performative cruelty, which are often preceded/followed by prayers, it is a victory to be kind. In a MAGA society filled with incompetent leaders, it is a victory to avoid despair and alcoholism and drug abuse. In a MAGA society filled with acts of performative and/or other stupidity, it is a victory to be well-read and well-educated. In a MAGA society filled with badly lived lives, it is a victory to live a well-lived life. PUNK ROCK LOSER https://bsky.app/profile/did:plc:s6ialkt7aqipmlcsoutmmoju THE INTELLECTUALIST NEWS FEED https://theintellectualist.com 58 Greatest Pride Songs and LGBTQ+ Anthems for Your Playlist https://www.goodhousekeeping.com/life/entertainment/g32947794/lgbt-pride-songs-anthems/ The 100 Greatest LGBTQ+ Anthems of All Time Here's a countdown of the songs that define queer culture. https://www.billboard.com/lists/lgbtq-anthems-queer-pride-songs/ NON-VIOLENT PROTESTS WORK! (90 seconds) It will take time and more effort, but we will prevail. https://www.facebook.com/reel/1273458134112664
item.dc:creator: oukid
